stimulus.content:
Study the following facts:

• The Nile River is the longest river in Africa.
• The Amazon River carries more water than any other river.
• The Mississippi River drains most of the central United States.

stem: What do these three rivers have in common as physical features?

choices.text: They all flow into the Atlantic Ocean
They are all major drainage systems for large land areas
They are all located on the same continent
They all begin in mountain ranges above 5,000 meters

answer_explanation: All three rivers are major drainage systems that collect water from large land areas called drainage basins. They are on different continents and flow into different bodies of water.
